brand_identity.name: AutoMerchant AI
brand_identity.mission: Automate the entire merchant services sales cycle with ruthless efficiency.

headings.usage: All section headers, metrics, and key data points.

body.usage: General UI text, tables, form inputs.

containers.dashboard_card: bg-card border border-border/40 shadow-sm hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-primary hover:bg-primary/90 text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none px-6 py-3 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)] transition-all active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary/20 hover:bg-secondary/30 text-secondary border border-secondary/50 font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide rounded-none px-6 py-3 transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-white/5 text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-colors uppercase tracking-wide rounded-none

cards.metric: bg-card border border-border p-6 relative overflow-hidden group hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-primary/10 transition-all
cards.lead: bg-card border-l-4 border-l-transparent hover:border-l-primary transition-all p-4 border-y border-r border-border

inputs.default: bg-background border-border focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-none h-12

status_indicators.live: animate-pulse bg-red-500 h-2 w-2 rounded-full inline-block mr-2
status_indicators.online: bg-green-500 h-2 w-2 rounded-full inline-block mr-2
status_indicators.working: animate-spin border-2 border-primary border-t-transparent h-4 w-4 rounded-full inline-block

textures.noise: url('data:image/svg+xml,...') opacity-5 mix-blend-overlay pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50

effects.tracing_beam: Use for 'Active Call' or 'Hot Lead' cards. A glowing gradient border that moves.
effects.glassmorphism: Use for Sidebar and Sticky Header only. Keep data panels solid for readability.
effects.glow: Box-shadows with colored transparency (e.g., shadow-blue-500/20) for primary actions.

motion.philosophy: Precision and Speed. No bouncy springs. Snappy eases.

transitions.page: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }} transition={{ duration: 0.2, ease: 'easeOut' }}

universal_guidelines: Use Dark Mode by default. The dashboard is for power users working long hours.
Data Density: Don't waste space. Use 'Bento' Mode B. Compact rows, clear columns.
Status Visibility: Every lead must have a clear visual status (New, Contacted, Analyzing, Closed).
AI Transparency: When AI is working (calling, emailing), show a visual indicator (pulsing dot, progress bar, or log stream).
No Gradients on Text: Keep text high-contrast white or light gray. Use gradients only on borders or icon backgrounds.
Sharp Edges: Prefer 'rounded-sm' or 'rounded-none' over 'rounded-xl' to convey precision and finance.
Dashboard Hierarchy: 1. Critical Alerts (Calls/Errors) -> 2. KPI Metrics -> 3. Active Pipeline -> 4. Activity Feed.
Navigation: Sidebar navigation is mandatory for this app type. Collapsible for more screen real estate.
